concept.shortdesc: Engine Oil: Use API CJ-4 or higher rated diesel engine oil. Viscosity: SAE 10W-30 for

conbody.p: Engine Oil: Use API CJ-4 or higher rated diesel engine oil. Viscosity: SAE 10W-30 for temperatures -10°C to 40°C; SAE 15W-40 for temperatures above 0°C.
Transmission Oil: Use CROWN approved ATF Dexron III or equivalent. Change interval: Every 1000 service hours or 6 months, whichever comes first.
Hydraulic Oil: Use CROWN approved hydraulic oil ISO VG 46. Change interval: Every 2000 service hours or annually. Filter change every 500 hours.
Differential and Final Drive Oil: Use SAE 80W-90 GL-5 gear oil. Change interval: Every 2000 service hours or annually.
Grease Points: Use lithium-based NLGI Grade 2 multipurpose grease. Lubricate all grease fittings every 250 service hours or monthly.
Coolant: Use CROWN approved ethylene glycol-based coolant diluted 50/50 with water. Change every 2000 service hours or annually.
Page 277 of 500 | CD100S-7 / CD120S-7 / CD140S-7 / CD160S-7 Operation & Maintenance Manual | DL06P Tier-4
Always follow all safety precautions when operating or maintaining this equipment.
Ensure all operators are properly trained and certified before operating the lift truck.
Regular maintenance is essential to safe and efficient operation of the lift truck.
Contact your local CROWN dealer for parts, service, and technical support.
Keep this manual with the lift truck at all times for reference by operators and technicians.
Record all service and maintenance activities in the maintenance logbook.
Only use genuine CROWN replacement parts to maintain warranty and performance.
